sourceAmbiguity: The blueprint distinguishes manual_review_only and unusable_terminal but does not define the terminal boundary.
decisionTaken: Only provider or policy terminal-unusable results settle unusable_terminal; degraded or failed-but-reviewable transcripts settle manual_review_only.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: It keeps reviewable audio in governed manual follow-up while allowing closure when no usable evidence can be recovered.
operationalRisk: A provider terminal flag must be trustworthy and audited.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Require a second scanner or staff adjudication before terminal closure if incident review finds false terminal classifications.
